purpose: Check whether OOS performance and drawdown control remain intact after IS/OOS split.
pass_rule_used_here: OOS CAGR>0, OOS MDD>=-20%, OOS Calmar>0.5
interpretation: dynamic_v1 remains strong in OOS, so the result is not only an in-sample artifact.

purpose: Check repeated 60-month train / 12-month test rolling evaluation.
pass_rule_used_here: at least 8 windows, WF MDD>=-20%, WF Calmar>0.5
interpretation: dynamic_v1 keeps acceptable drawdown-adjusted performance in walk-forward windows.

purpose: Check whether performance depends on a single lucky period using rolling 36-month windows.
pass_rule_used_here: negative cumulative return window ratio<=10%, worst 3Y MDD>=-20%
interpretation: dynamic_v1 has a low negative-window ratio and controlled worst-window drawdown.

purpose: Check whether 10bp cost and annual turnover undermine the conclusion.
pass_rule_used_here: 10bp Calmar>0.5, avg annual one-way turnover<=100%, max annual one-way turnover<=200%
interpretation: dynamic_v1 remains viable after transaction-cost and turnover checks.
